"'''Melvin Fett'''" was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] that appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]].

==Plot summary==
[[Melvin Fett]], cousin of the infamous [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], travels to the "dessert" [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] seeking the bounty on [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], hoping to finally gain respect from other [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. As he walks under the boiling twin suns in the Tatooine dunes, he hears Jar Jar, but because he is unable to see because of the sweat stinging his eyes, he doesn't notice that it is just a Jawa drinking out of a [[Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup|Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup]] with flexible straw and "talking action." As he pulls out his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], he trips on a rock, and the blaster flies out of his hands and knocks out the Jawa. Grabbing the cup, he praises himself for the capture, believing he will finally get the respect he deserves.
